title: DeliveryQuoteReq
description: DeliveryQuoteReq schema from Uber Direct (DaaS) API

pickup_address.description: JSON string containing pickup address details.

dropoff_address.description: JSON string containing dropoff address details.

pickup_ready_dt.description: (RFC 3339) Beginning of the window when an order must be picked up.

pickup_deadline_dt.description: (RFC 3339) End of the window when an order may be picked up.

dropoff_ready_dt.description: (RFC 3339) Beginning of the window when an order must be dropped off.

dropoff_deadline_dt.description: (RFC 3339) End of the window when an order must be dropped off.

pickup_phone_number.description: Phone number for the pickup location.

dropoff_phone_number.description: Phone number for the dropoff location.

manifest_total_value.description: Value in cents of the items in the delivery.

external_store_id.description: Partner reference to a store or location.
